description:
Created from bare go intent:

Harden GO multi-item execution closure

1. Durably link the exact source instruction used to create a GO task, including a stable content hash and optional source reference for separate Telegram-message handoff.
2. Track every requested outcome R# as verified, blocked, or rejected with evidence.
3. Refuse manual and autonomous finish while any requested outcome lacks an explicit terminal disposition and evidence.
4. Add end-to-end regressions proving 7/8 outcomes blocks completion and 8/8 permits completion.

requested_outcomes.text: Durably link the exact source instruction used to create a GO task, including a stable content hash and optional source reference for separate Telegram-message handoff.

evidence.summary: Intent-created tasks persist exact text, SHA-256, and source_ref; source linkage asserted by test_go_intent_links_exact_source_and_manual_finish_requires_all_outcomes.

requested_outcomes.text: Track every requested outcome R# as verified, blocked, or rejected with evidence.

evidence.summary: task outcome CLI records verified|blocked|rejected plus timestamped agent evidence and appends outcome.disposition_recorded evidence events.

requested_outcomes.text: Refuse manual and autonomous finish while any requested outcome lacks an explicit terminal disposition and evidence.

evidence.summary: Manual finish calls outcome_completion_findings; autonomous loop returns blocked and leaves task active when any R# is pending or lacks evidence.

requested_outcomes.text: Add end-to-end regressions proving 7/8 outcomes blocks completion and 8/8 permits completion.

evidence.summary: Focused regressions passed: 7/8 returns blocked with R8 findings; 8/8 returns done and moves task to done.

decomposition_policy.rule: List numbering is acceptance coverage, not an automatic task boundary.

acceptance: R1: Durably link the exact source instruction used to create a GO task, including a stable content hash and optional source reference for separate Telegram-message handoff.
R2: Track every requested outcome R# as verified, blocked, or rejected with evidence.
R3: Refuse manual and autonomous finish while any requested outcome lacks an explicit terminal disposition and evidence.
R4: Add end-to-end regressions proving 7/8 outcomes blocks completion and 8/8 permits completion.
All requested outcomes are verified or explicitly blocked with evidence.

evidence.summary: RED: autonomous 7/8 regression initially failed due adapter selection; corrected no-op build boundary. GREEN: focused 2 tests passed. Regression: full 94 tests passed; make check passed; .go validate and intent SHA readback passed. R1-R4 each verified with item-specific evidence. Recheck: docs/skill require exact prior-message text plus durable source_ref; changelog updated. Ship: implementation commit 14aa498; no push/release requested.
